description_long: This is a medium-sized, arched wooden storage chest reinforced with dark metal bands and corner brackets, giving it a sturdy and secure appearance. The wood panels are textured with a visible grain and a reddish-brown hue, while the metal accents are a dark, weathered gray with brass highlights at the joints and edges. The front features a prominent metal latch and lock mechanism, suggesting it is designed to keep contents secure. Both ends of the chest have large, round metal handles attached to the metal frame, allowing for easy lifting and transport. The lid is a curved, hinged design, likely opening upwards to reveal the interior. The overall construction and materials suggest it is suitable for use in garages, storage rooms, or outdoor urban environments where durability is important.
description: A medium-sized, arched wooden chest with dark metal reinforcements, brass accents, and a secure front latch. Features side handles for carrying and a hinged, curved lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved lid, central metal latch and lock, and wood grain panels framed by dark metal.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched profile, brass end cap, and a large round metal handle attached to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wood and metal construction, with no visible latch or lock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other end, with a round metal handle and brass end cap.
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, storage room, or outdoor
